Resource Profile: SE EHDS Immunization – Vaccinationer (GetVaccinationHistory)

Official URL: https://fhir.inera.se/ig/ehds-tk/StructureDefinition/inera-ehds-immunization Version: 0.1.0
Draft as of 2026-06-24 Computable Name: IneraEHDSImmunization

Profil för vaccinationer mappat från RIVTA-tjänstekontraktet GetVaccinationHistory (clinicalprocess:activityprescription:actoutcome v2.0). Täcker NPÖ 2.0 och 1177 Journal 1.0, 2.0.

Användningar:

  • Denna Profil används inte av några profiler i denna implementationsguide

Du kan också kontrollera användningar i FHIR IG-statistiken

Formal Views of Profile Content

Description of Profiles, Differentials, Snapshots and how the different presentations work.

  • Key Elements Table
  • Differential Table
  • Snapshot Table
  • Statistics/References
  • All
NamnFlaggorKard.TypBeskrivning & begränsningar    Filter:
Begränsningar
Bindningar
Skyldigheter
Immunization 0..* ImmunizationUvIps(2.0.0) Immunization event information
meta Σ 0..1 Meta Metadata about the resource
source SΣ 0..1 uri Källsystem HSA-id (vaccinationMedicalRecordHeader.sourceSystemHSAId)
security SΣ 0..* Coding PDL-kontroll (vaccinationMedicalRecordHeader.approvedForPatient) – se PDL-001
Bindning: All Security Labels (extensible): Security Labels from the Healthcare Privacy and Security Classification System.
implicitRules ?!Σ 0..1 uri A set of rules under which this content was created
Skivor för extension 0..* Extension Extension
Skiva: Oordnad, Öppen av value:url
extension:legalAuthenticator S 0..1 (Komplex) Juridisk äkthetsintygsgivare för vaccination
URL: https://fhir.inera.se/ig/ehds-tk/StructureDefinition/immunization-legal-authenticator
extension:patientPostalCode S 0..1 string Patientens postnummer vid vaccination
URL: https://fhir.inera.se/ig/ehds-tk/StructureDefinition/immunization-patient-postal-code
extension:registrationDevice S 0..1 Reference(SE EHDS Device – Källsystem (GetVaccinationHistory registrationRecord)) Källsystem för vaccinationsregistrering
URL: https://fhir.inera.se/ig/ehds-tk/StructureDefinition/immunization-registration-device
extension:isDoseComplete S 0..1 boolean Fullständig dos administrerad
URL: https://fhir.inera.se/ig/ehds-tk/StructureDefinition/immunization-is-dose-complete
modifierExtension ?! 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored
identifier S 0..* Identifier Dokumentidentifierare (vaccinationMedicalRecordHeader.documentId)
status ?!SOΣ 1..1 code Vaccinationsstatus – 'completed' normalt; 'entered-in-error' om nullified=true
Bindning: ImmunizationStatusCodes (required): A set of codes indicating the current status of an Immunization.
SkyldigheterAktörKälla
SHALL:populate-if-known Creator (IPS) from Immunization (IPS)
SHALL:handle Consumer (IPS) from Immunization (IPS)
SHOULD:display Consumer (IPS) from Immunization (IPS)
statusReason S 0..1 CodeableConcept Makuleringsorsak (vaccinationMedicalRecordHeader.nullifiedReason)
Bindning: ImmunizationStatusReasonCodes (example): The reason why a vaccine was not administered.
vaccineCode SOΣ 1..1 CodeableConceptIPS(2.0.0) Vaccin (administrationRecord.typeOfVaccine / administrationRecord.vaccineName)
Bindning: Vaccines - IPS (preferred): The type of vaccine for particular disease or diseases against which the patient has been immunised, or a code for absent/unknown immunization.
Ytterligare bindningarSyfteDokumentation
Vaccines WHO ATC - IPS candidate
For when WHO ATC code system is preferred

SHALL:handle Consumer (IPS) from Immunization (IPS)
SHOULD:display Consumer (IPS) from Immunization (IPS)

occurrenceDateTime dateTime
occurrenceString string

SkyldigheterAktörKälla
SHOULD:able-to-populate Creator (IPS) from Immunization (IPS)
SHALL:handle Consumer (IPS) from Immunization (IPS)
SHOULD:display Consumer (IPS) from Immunization (IPS)
recorded S 0..1 dateTime Registreringsdatum (vaccinationMedicalRecordBody.registrationRecord.date)
primarySource SΣ 0..1 boolean false om vaccinationen efterregistrerats (sourceDescription är satt)
reportOrigin S 0..1 CodeableConcept Källa för efterregistrerad vaccination (administrationRecord.sourceDescription) – fritext i reportOrigin.text; originaltext för eventuell kod
Bindning: ImmunizationOriginCodes (example): The source of the data for a record which is not from a primary source.
lotNumber S 0..1 string Batchnummer (administrationRecord.vaccineBatchId)
site S 0..1 CodeableConcept Injektionsställe (administrationRecord.anatomicalSite)
Bindning: SNOMEDCTBodyStructures (preferred)
route S 0..1 CodeableConcept Administreringssätt (administrationRecord.route)
Bindning: SNOMEDCTRouteCodes (preferred): SNOMED Route Terms
Ytterligare bindningarSyfte
Medicine EDQM Route of Administration - IPS candidate
doseQuantity S 0..1 SimpleQuantity(4.0.1) Dos (administrationRecord.dose.quantity)
Skivor för performer Σ 0..* BackboneElement Who performed event
Skiva: Oordnad, Öppen av pattern:function
performer:Alla skivor Innehåll/regler för alla skivor
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
actor Σ 1..1 Reference(Practitioner | PractitionerRole | Organization) Individual or organization who was performing
performer:administering SΣ 0..* BackboneElement Who performed event
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
function SΣ 1..1 CodeableConcept What type of performance was done
Bindning: ImmunizationFunctionCodes (extensible): The role a practitioner or organization plays in the immunization event.

Fast värde: AP
display 0..1 string Representation defined by the system

text 0..1 string Plain text representation of the concept
actor SΣ 1..1 Reference(PractitionerRole | SE EHDS Organization – Organisationsenhet) Administrerande yrkesutövare/enhet (administrationRecord.performer / performerOrg; registrationRecord.careGiverOrg)

display 0..1 string Representation defined by the system
userSelected 0..1 boolean If this coding was chosen directly by the user
text 0..1 string Plain text representation of the concept
actor SΣ 1..1 Reference(PractitionerRole | SE EHDS Organization – Organisationsenhet) Förskrivande yrkesutövare/enhet (administrationRecord.prescriberPerson / prescriberOrg)
note SΣ 0..* Annotation Ostrukturerad anteckning (registrationRecord.vaccinationUnstructuredNote) / kommentar
isSubpotent ?!Σ 0..1 boolean Dose potency
programEligibility S 0..* CodeableConcept Riskgrupp/programbehörighet (registrationRecord.riskCategory)
Bindning: ImmunizationProgramEligibility (example): The patient's eligibility for a vaccation program.
reaction S 0..* BackboneElement Biverkning (registrationRecord.patientAdverseEffect / administrationRecord.patientAdverseEffect)
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
protocolApplied S 0..* BackboneElement Vaccinationsprotokoll (administrationRecord)
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
series S 0..1 string Vaccinationsprogram (administrationRecord.vaccinationProgramName)
targetDisease S 0..* CodeableConcept Målsjukdom (administrationRecord.vaccineTargetDisease)
Bindning: Vaccine Target Diseases - IPS (preferred): The particular disease or diseases against which the patient has been immunized.
Skivor för doseNumber[x] 1..1 Dose number within series
Skiva: Oordnad, Öppen av type:$this
doseNumberPositiveInt positiveInt
doseNumberString string
doseNumber[x]:doseNumberPositiveInt S 0..1 positiveInt Dosnummer (administrationRecord.doseOrdinalNumber)
Skivor för seriesDoses[x] 0..1 Recommended number of doses for immunity
Skiva: Oordnad, Öppen av type:$this
seriesDosesPositiveInt positiveInt
seriesDosesString string
seriesDoses[x]:seriesDosesPositiveInt S 0..1 positiveInt Antal ordinerade doser (administrationRecord.numberOfPrescribedDoses)

Sökväg Status Användning ValueSet Version Källa

Immunization.protocolApplied.​targetDisease Base preferred Vaccine Target Diseases - IPS 📦2.0.0 International Patient Summary Implementation Guide v2.0

Begränsningar

Id Grad Sökväg(ar) Beskrivning Uttryck
dom-2 error Immunization If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources contained.contained.empty()
dom-3 error Immunization If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()
dom-4 error Immunization If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated contained.meta.versionId.empty() and contained.meta.lastUpdated.empty()
dom-5 error Immunization If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6 bästa praxis Immunization A resource should have narrative for robust management text.`div`.exists()
ele-1 error **ALLA** element All FHIR elements must have a @value or children hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1 error **ALLA** extensions Must have either extensions or value[x], not both extension.exists() != value.exists()

This structure is derived from ImmunizationUvIps

code 1..1 code Symbol in syntax defined by the system
Fast värde: OP
display 0..1 string Representation defined by the system
userSelected 0..1 boolean If this coding was chosen directly by the user
text 0..1 string Plain text representation of the concept
actor SΣ 1..1 Reference(PractitionerRole | SE EHDS Organization – Organisationsenhet) Förskrivande yrkesutövare/enhet (administrationRecord.prescriberPerson / prescriberOrg)
note SΣ 0..* Annotation Ostrukturerad anteckning (registrationRecord.vaccinationUnstructuredNote) / kommentar
reasonCode 0..* CodeableConcept Why immunization occurred
Bindning: ImmunizationReasonCodes (example): The reason why a vaccine was administered.
reasonReference 0..* Reference(Condition | Observation | DiagnosticReport) Why immunization occurred
isSubpotent ?!Σ 0..1 boolean Dose potency
subpotentReason 0..* CodeableConcept Reason for being subpotent
Bindning: ImmunizationSubpotentReason (example): The reason why a dose is considered to be subpotent.
education C 0..* BackboneElement Educational material presented to patient
Constraints: imm-1
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
documentType 0..1 string Educational material document identifier
reference 0..1 uri Educational material reference pointer
publicationDate 0..1 dateTime Educational material publication date
presentationDate 0..1 dateTime Educational material presentation date
programEligibility S 0..* CodeableConcept Riskgrupp/programbehörighet (registrationRecord.riskCategory)
Bindning: ImmunizationProgramEligibility (example): The patient's eligibility for a vaccation program.
fundingSource 0..1 CodeableConcept Funding source for the vaccine
Bindning: ImmunizationFundingSource (example): The source of funding used to purchase the vaccine administered.
reaction S 0..* BackboneElement Biverkning (registrationRecord.patientAdverseEffect / administrationRecord.patientAdverseEffect)
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
date 0..1 dateTime When reaction started
detail 0..1 Reference(Observation) Additional information on reaction
reported 0..1 boolean Indicates self-reported reaction
protocolApplied S 0..* BackboneElement Vaccinationsprotokoll (administrationRecord)
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
series S 0..1 string Vaccinationsprogram (administrationRecord.vaccinationProgramName)
authority 0..1 Reference(Organization) Who is responsible for publishing the recommendations
targetDisease S 0..* CodeableConcept Målsjukdom (administrationRecord.vaccineTargetDisease)
Bindning: Vaccine Target Diseases - IPS (preferred): The particular disease or diseases against which the patient has been immunized.

Skiva: Oordnad, Öppen av type:$this
doseNumberPositiveInt positiveInt

Begränsningar

Id Grad Sökväg(ar) Beskrivning Uttryck
dom-2 error Immunization If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources contained.contained.empty()
dom-3 error Immunization If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()
dom-4 error Immunization If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated contained.meta.versionId.empty() and contained.meta.lastUpdated.empty()
dom-5 error Immunization If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6 bästa praxis Immunization A resource should have narrative for robust management text.`div`.exists()
ele-1 error **ALLA** element All FHIR elements must have a @value or children hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1 error **ALLA** extensions Must have either extensions or value[x], not both extension.exists() != value.exists()
imm-1 error Immunization.education One of documentType or reference SHALL be present documentType.exists() or reference.exists()

This structure is derived from ImmunizationUvIps

Sammanfattning

Obligatorisk: 0 element(2 nästlade obligatoriska elements)
Måste stödjas: 31 elements

Strukturer

Denna struktur refererar till dessa andra strukturer:

  • SE EHDS Patient (https://fhir.inera.se/ig/ehds-tk/StructureDefinition/inera-ehds-patient)
  • SE EHDS Organization – Organisationsenhet (https://fhir.inera.se/ig/ehds-tk/StructureDefinition/inera-ehds-organization)

Extensions

Denna struktur refererar till dessa extensions:

  • https://fhir.inera.se/ig/ehds-tk/StructureDefinition/immunization-legal-authenticator
  • https://fhir.inera.se/ig/ehds-tk/StructureDefinition/immunization-patient-postal-code
  • https://fhir.inera.se/ig/ehds-tk/StructureDefinition/immunization-registration-device
  • https://fhir.inera.se/ig/ehds-tk/StructureDefinition/immunization-is-dose-complete

Skivor

Denna struktur definierar följande skivor:

  • Elementet 1 är uppdelat baserat på värdet av Immunization.occurrence[x]
  • Elementet 1 är uppdelat baserat på värdet av Immunization.performer
  • Elementet 1 är uppdelat baserat på värdet av Immunization.protocolApplied.doseNumber[x]
  • Elementet 1 är uppdelat baserat på värdet av Immunization.protocolApplied.seriesDoses[x]

Skiva: Oordnad, Öppen av value:url
versionId Σ 0..1 id Version specific identifier
lastUpdated Σ 0..1 instant When the resource version last changed
source SΣ 0..1 uri Källsystem HSA-id (vaccinationMedicalRecordHeader.sourceSystemHSAId)
profile Σ 0..* canonical(StructureDefinition) Profiles this resource claims to conform to
security SΣ 0..* Coding PDL-kontroll (vaccinationMedicalRecordHeader.approvedForPatient) – se PDL-001
Bindning: All Security Labels (extensible): Security Labels from the Healthcare Privacy and Security Classification System.
tag Σ 0..* Coding Tags applied to this resource
Bindning: CommonTags (example): Codes that represent various types of tags, commonly workflow-related; e.g. "Needs review by Dr. Jones".
implicitRules ?!Σ 0..1 uri A set of rules under which this content was created
language 0..1 code Language of the resource content
Bindning: CommonLanguages (preferred): A human language.

AllLanguages Maxbindning
text 0..1 Narrative Text summary of the resource, for human interpretation
This profile does not constrain the narrative in regard to content, language, or traceability to data elements
contained 0..* Resource Contained, inline Resources

Skiva: Oordnad, Öppen av value:url
extension:legalAuthenticator S 0..1 (Komplex) Juridisk äkthetsintygsgivare för vaccination
URL: https://fhir.inera.se/ig/ehds-tk/StructureDefinition/immunization-legal-authenticator
extension:patientPostalCode S 0..1 string Patientens postnummer vid vaccination
URL: https://fhir.inera.se/ig/ehds-tk/StructureDefinition/immunization-patient-postal-code

extension:isDoseComplete S 0..1 boolean Fullständig dos administrerad
URL: https://fhir.inera.se/ig/ehds-tk/StructureDefinition/immunization-is-dose-complete
modifierExtension ?! 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored
identifier S 0..* Identifier Dokumentidentifierare (vaccinationMedicalRecordHeader.documentId)
status ?!SOΣ 1..1 code Vaccinationsstatus – 'completed' normalt; 'entered-in-error' om nullified=true
Bindning: ImmunizationStatusCodes (required): A set of codes indicating the current status of an Immunization.

SHALL:populate-if-known Creator (IPS) from Immunization (IPS)
SHALL:handle Consumer (IPS) from Immunization (IPS)
SHOULD:display Consumer (IPS) from Immunization (IPS)
statusReason S 0..1 CodeableConcept Makuleringsorsak (vaccinationMedicalRecordHeader.nullifiedReason)
Bindning: ImmunizationStatusReasonCodes (example): The reason why a vaccine was not administered.
vaccineCode SOΣ 1..1 CodeableConceptIPS(2.0.0) Vaccin (administrationRecord.typeOfVaccine / administrationRecord.vaccineName)
Bindning: Vaccines - IPS (preferred): The type of vaccine for particular disease or diseases against which the patient has been immunised, or a code for absent/unknown immunization.

Bindning: ImmunizationSubpotentReason (example): The reason why a dose is considered to be subpotent.
education C 0..* BackboneElement Educational material presented to patient
Constraints: imm-1
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
documentType 0..1 string Educational material document identifier
reference 0..1 uri Educational material reference pointer
publicationDate 0..1 dateTime Educational material publication date
presentationDate 0..1 dateTime Educational material presentation date
programEligibility S 0..* CodeableConcept Riskgrupp/programbehörighet (registrationRecord.riskCategory)
Bindning: ImmunizationProgramEligibility (example): The patient's eligibility for a vaccation program.
fundingSource 0..1 CodeableConcept Funding source for the vaccine
Bindning: ImmunizationFundingSource (example): The source of funding used to purchase the vaccine administered.
reaction S 0..* BackboneElement Biverkning (registrationRecord.patientAdverseEffect / administrationRecord.patientAdverseEffect)

extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
date 0..1 dateTime When reaction started
detail 0..1 Reference(Observation) Additional information on reaction
reported 0..1 boolean Indicates self-reported reaction
protocolApplied S 0..* BackboneElement Vaccinationsprotokoll (administrationRecord)
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
series S 0..1 string Vaccinationsprogram (administrationRecord.vaccinationProgramName)
authority 0..1 Reference(Organization) Who is responsible for publishing the recommendations
targetDisease S 0..* CodeableConcept Målsjukdom (administrationRecord.vaccineTargetDisease)
Bindning: Vaccine Target Diseases - IPS (preferred): The particular disease or diseases against which the patient has been immunized.

Begränsningar

Id Grad Sökväg(ar) Beskrivning Uttryck
dom-2 error Immunization If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources contained.contained.empty()
dom-3 error Immunization If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()
dom-4 error Immunization If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated contained.meta.versionId.empty() and contained.meta.lastUpdated.empty()
dom-5 error Immunization If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6 bästa praxis Immunization A resource should have narrative for robust management text.`div`.exists()
ele-1 error **ALLA** element All FHIR elements must have a @value or children hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1 error **ALLA** extensions Must have either extensions or value[x], not both extension.exists() != value.exists()
imm-1 error Immunization.education One of documentType or reference SHALL be present documentType.exists() or reference.exists()

This structure is derived from ImmunizationUvIps

Sammanfattning

Obligatorisk: 0 element(2 nästlade obligatoriska elements)
Måste stödjas: 31 elements

Strukturer

Denna struktur refererar till dessa andra strukturer:

  • SE EHDS Patient (https://fhir.inera.se/ig/ehds-tk/StructureDefinition/inera-ehds-patient)
  • SE EHDS Organization – Organisationsenhet (https://fhir.inera.se/ig/ehds-tk/StructureDefinition/inera-ehds-organization)

Extensions

Denna struktur refererar till dessa extensions:

  • https://fhir.inera.se/ig/ehds-tk/StructureDefinition/immunization-legal-authenticator
  • https://fhir.inera.se/ig/ehds-tk/StructureDefinition/immunization-patient-postal-code
  • https://fhir.inera.se/ig/ehds-tk/StructureDefinition/immunization-registration-device
  • https://fhir.inera.se/ig/ehds-tk/StructureDefinition/immunization-is-dose-complete

Skivor

Denna struktur definierar följande skivor:

  • Elementet 1 är uppdelat baserat på värdet av Immunization.occurrence[x]
  • Elementet 1 är uppdelat baserat på värdet av Immunization.performer
  • Elementet 1 är uppdelat baserat på värdet av Immunization.protocolApplied.doseNumber[x]
  • Elementet 1 är uppdelat baserat på värdet av Immunization.protocolApplied.seriesDoses[x]
